texto: I think actually if you take the analogy with other areas of engineering, and increasingly of science and even mathematics, you can see people do not have to learn the vast number of formulae they used to learn. Instead, they have to learn to use the computer effectively. This frees them, I feel, to understand concepts and the foundations while they’re learning the mechanics of the application of the theory.
explicacao: Orientação direta de C.A.R. Hoare sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “I think actually if you take the analogy with other areas of engineering, and increasingly of sci…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, application, concepts, útil em momentos de concepts e learning.

frase_original: I think actually if you take the analogy with other areas of engineering, and increasingly of science and even mathematics, you can see people do not have to learn the vast number of formulae they used to learn. Instead, they have to learn to use the computer effectively. This frees them, I feel, to understand concepts and the foundations while they’re learning the mechanics of the application of the theory.
